title: duretia quelpaertensis
intro: Duretia quelpaertensis is a plant species in the Rubiaceae family, native to the Philippines. It is known for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues. Duretia quelpaertensis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts for medicinal use, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
